# gcore_cloud_inference_secret (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gcore_cloud_inference_secret" "example_cloud_inference_secret" {
  project_id = 1
  data = {
    aws_access_key_id = "fake-key-id"
    aws_secret_access_key = "fake-secret"
  }
  name = "aws-dev"
  type = "aws-iam"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (Attributes) Secret data. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data))
- `name` (String) Secret name.
- `type` (String) Secret type. Currently only `aws-iam` is supported.

### Optional

- `project_id` (Number) Project ID
- `secret_name` (String) Inference secret name.

<a id="nestedatt--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data`

Required:

- `aws_access_key_id` (String) AWS IAM key ID.
- `aws_secret_access_key` (String) AWS IAM secret key.
